response.overview: Teresa, addicted to slot machines and beer, survives day to day enduring the abuse of her bigorexic son. María, addicted to sex and drugs, lives with the hypocrisy of her friends, who criticize and envy her. Alfonso, married with two children, hides his Chemsex addiction. Altagracia, a strong woman, faces the situation of her daughter Elizabeth, a habitual marijuana user and linked to youth gangs. Unbeknownst to them, all these characters are connected and end up seeking help from the same addiction expert.
response.tagline: Fictional movie based in real events about mental health and addictions.
response.title: Addictus
